rationale: Review 2's finding is correct and material for api-design (antipode_convMul_id is defined publicly at diff:64 but used only inside private convInv_mul_cancel and irrelevant to the functor-of-points target API). Acting on Review 1 either wastes effort on a non-issue (antipodeAlgHom claim is absent from the shown module docstring) or adds needless surface (exposing it) / minor style (the @[simp] on mapValue_comp); noncomputable nits are orthogonal to API. The resulting PR after Review 2 is thus cleaner.
